creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yuri,

Thanks for the patch.
Unfortunately, this update breaks cad/meshlab.
Back in April 2022 I contacted lbartoletti@ and see if he could update cad/meshlab to match the version of devel/vcglib but I suppose he didn't have time to do it.

I think we would need to update cad/meshlab to 2022.02 too.
